positive: A stylized, abstract jungle canopy viewed from below, featuring massive, interlocking tropical leaves and glowing, bioluminescent flora. The composition should use a strong circular symmetry around the center, forming a mesmerizing, high-contrast silhouette against a gradient sunset sky. Focus on geometric patterns within the organic shapes, utilizing deep emerald greens, vibrant sapphire blues, and pops of neon electric cyan. The style must be a mix of art deco graphic design and stylized nature illustration, perfect for apparel printing. Clean lines, high contrast, visible texture, vector graphic feel.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, bad quality, lowres
